\tzpentry{ID3703}{Quantum Casimir Pressure Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3703 introduces Quantum Casimir Pressure Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} P_{\mathrm{Casimir}} = -\frac{\hbar c \pi^2}{240 d^4}, \end{equation}
